TestCase z30Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_elements = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_elements, t1.elements, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.elements = follow_case_elements;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code: ensure there is at least one element to remove
    if (follow_case.n == 0) {
        // No elements to remove, return replica directly
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation: remove a random element (shrink array by 1)
    int remove_idx = rand() % follow_case.n;  // random index in [0, n-1]
    for (int i = remove_idx; i < follow_case.n - 1; ++i) {
        follow_case.elements[i] = follow_case.elements[i + 1];
    }
    follow_case.n -= 1;
    
    return follow_case;
}
